response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with nearly two decades of fullstack experience spanning web, mobile, and embedded systems, and recent roles align well with the primary stack: TypeScript, Node.js, and React in production at Tencent, plus current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) at Naver, which directly satisfies the rare AI agent development requirement. Testing craftsmanship (TDD, authored test libraries, Selenium training) and cloud/container exposure (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes, MongoDB, MySQL) round out the profile. The main gaps are no explicit Nest.js or Kotlin experience and a frontend history weighted toward Ember.js, but these are learnable given the depth elsewhere.
strengths: Deep fullstack TypeScript/Node.js and React production experience at scale, well beyond the 6-year bar
Current AI-agent development work (MCP code generators, agentic workflow tooling) matching an explicit job requirement
Strong testing and software-craftsmanship background (TDD, authored test frameworks, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, a core framework in the primary stack
Kotlin and Python are absent from the skills list; Java exposure appears limited and dated
Frontend history is heavily Ember.js, with React confined to one recent role

key_factors.factor: Hands-on AI agent and MCP tooling development
